user.title: SwitchBot API credentials
user.description: Get your token and secret from the SwitchBot app. Open the app, go to Profile, then Preferences (or Preferences -> About on app 9.0+). Tap the App Version number 10 times to reveal Developer Options. Tap Developer Options, then Get Token to view your token and secret key. Copy both values and enter them below.

reconfigure.title: Update SwitchBot API credentials
reconfigure.description: Enter your new token and secret. The integration will validate them and reload automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the SwitchBot API

abort.already_configured: This SwitchBot authentication helper is already configured.

init.title: SwitchBot devices

get_devices.name: Get devices
get_devices.description: Fetch the SwitchBot device list and return names, IDs, and types.

get_auth_headers.name: Get auth headers
get_auth_headers.description: Generate a fresh set of SwitchBot auth headers and return them with expiry metadata.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Send a SwitchBot command to a device. Select your device by name from the dropdown — the device ID, available commands, and parameters are determined automatically based on the device type. Run 'Get devices' first if the dropdown is empty.

device_name.name: Device
device_name.description: Select the device by name. The list is populated from your SwitchBot account. If the list is empty, run the 'Get devices' action first to refresh.

device_id.name: Device ID (advanced)
device_id.description: Use this instead of the device name if you know the raw device ID. Only needed if the device dropdown is not populated.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command to send. Available commands depend on the selected device type. For most devices, choose from: turnOn, turnOff, toggle, etc. For IR 'Others' remotes, enter the custom button name you defined in the SwitchBot app.

parameter.name: Parameter
parameter.description: The command parameter. Many commands use 'default' automatically. For commands that need input (e.g. setBrightness, setColor, setPosition), enter the value here. Leave blank to use the default.

command_type.name: Command type
command_type.description: Automatically set to 'command' for physical devices or 'customize' for IR 'Others' remotes. Only change this if you need to override the automatic detection.
